evals.name: inbox_listing
evals.expected_output: A clear listing of inbox tasks with their names and any notable metadata (flag, due date).

evals.name: overdue
evals.expected_output: Tasks whose effective due date has passed and are not completed; ideally with project context.

evals.name: flagged
evals.prompt: Show me everything flagged in OmniFocus that I haven't finished.
evals.expected_output: Flagged, incomplete tasks with project context.

evals.name: today_agenda
evals.prompt: What's on my plate today in OmniFocus?
evals.expected_output: Forecast/today-style answer combining due-today, deferred-to-today (or available-today), and overdue carry-over.

evals.name: retrospective_week
evals.prompt: What did I complete in OmniFocus over the last 7 days? Group by project.
evals.expected_output: Completed-in-window listing grouped by containing project.

evals.name: decision_support
evals.prompt: I have about an hour. Looking at my OmniFocus, what should I work on next? Pick one thing and explain why.
evals.expected_output: A single recommendation with reasoning grounded in OmniFocus state (due dates, flags, project, tags).

evals.name: stale_review
evals.prompt: Which of my OmniFocus projects haven't been reviewed in a while and might need attention?
evals.expected_output: Projects sorted/filtered by nextReviewDate or lastReviewDate (skill explicitly calls these out).

evals.name: capture_simple
evals.prompt: Add a task to my OmniFocus inbox called 'SKILLTEST_prep slides for Tuesday meeting'. Flag it and set the due date to next Tuesday at 3pm.
evals.expected_output: Created task in inbox with the exact name, flagged=true, due date set to the upcoming Tuesday at 15:00.

evals.name: planning_project
evals.prompt: Set up an OmniFocus project called 'SKILLTEST_Oregon coast trip' for a weekend trip planning. Break it down into the typical tasks for a coastal weekend (lodging, route, packing, food, etc.) — use your judgment for the breakdown.
evals.expected_output: A new project with that exact name containing several sensible tasks.

evals.name: modify_existing
evals.prompt: I have a task in my OmniFocus inbox named exactly 'SKILLTEST_seed task to modify'. Find it, rename it to 'SKILLTEST_seed task — renamed', set it flagged, set its due date to this Friday at 5pm, and add a tag named 'SKILLTEST_tag' (creating the tag if needed).
evals.expected_output: The seed task has the new name, is flagged, has due date set to upcoming Friday 17:00, and bears the SKILLTEST_tag tag.
